title: eleocharis chamaegyne
intro: Eleocharis chamaegyne, also known as the Spike-rush or Dwarf Spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Consuming Eleocharis chamaegyne has been associated with several health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
